## First and foremost consider this:

- Only documentation related issues should be filed here. Not RetroArch bugs, or
  core bugs, or game bugs, or build errors.
- Before reporting an HTTP 404 Page Not Found error, perform a "hard refresh"
  with <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>Shift</kbd>+<kbd>R</kbd> on the page to rule out any
  stale cache issues.
